title: IndiGo Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: IndiGo Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!
